---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**To reproduce**
Steps / command (e.g. the CLI question, the `INGESTOR`/`LLM`/`VECTOR_BACKEND` env).

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Trust property?**
Does this involve the citation guard (a fabricated/ungrounded/non-retrieved
citation, or `hallucinations > 0`)? If so, please also see SECURITY.md — these
may warrant private reporting.

**Environment**
OS, Python version, which extras installed, GPU (if any).
